positive: A highly stylized and geometric celestial map design featuring interconnected constellation lines and abstract planetary orbits. The primary colors are deep indigo blue, cosmic violet, and luminous electric teal, set against a midnight black background. Focus on clean, crisp silhouettes of mythical constellations (like the Great Bear or Orion) rendered in glowing, dotted lines. The composition must be perfectly centered and symmetrical, optimized for apparel printing. Use a minimalist Art Deco or Neo-Geometric aesthetic, achieving maximum visual contrast and a clean, graphic appeal. High resolution, flat graphic design, vector art style.
